title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India Ventures Solutions in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India Ventures Solutions:
Hyundai India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India Ventures Solutions!
